style_prefix: Cinematic high-quality realistic K-drama style, deep emotional lighting, detailed facial textures, 8k, bokeh background

mr_kim.default: Korean man, age 70, silver hair, kind wrinkles, weathered skin, 170cm height
mr_kim.guard: Korean man, age 70, silver hair, kind wrinkles, navy blue security guard uniform with soft cap, holding a flashlight
mr_kim.patient: Korean man, age 70, silver hair, looking thinner and pale, wearing a light mint green hospital gown, sad and weary eyes

eun_seo.default: Korean woman, age 32, neat shoulder-length black hair, expressive big eyes with tears, wearing a cream-colored wool coat over a brown turtleneck

images.prompt_en: Wide-angle landscape of a quiet, peaceful apartment complex at night. Dim warm streetlights, long shadows, a sense of solitude and stillness.
Low-angle close-up of worn-out black security guard boots walking slowly on asphalt. The guard uniform trousers are visible. Dim street lighting.
Side-profile mid-shot of the guard checking a metal lock on a gate. His white breath is visible in the cold night air. The flashlight beam illuminates the lock.
Inside a small, cramped security guard booth. Mr. Kim is sitting under a dim warm desk lamp, surrounded by monitors and old papers. Moody atmosphere.
Extreme close-up of a trembling hand holding a very old, faded, and slightly torn photograph of a laughing 10-year-old girl. High detail on the paper texture.
Close-up of Mr. Kim's face, focusing on his wet, reflective eyes as he looks at the photo. The warm light from the lamp highlights his deep wrinkles.
A long, sterile, and cold hospital hallway with flickering fluorescent lights. The walls are pale and impersonal. A sense of unease.
Extreme close-up of a medical monitor showing a chest X-ray. A small, ominous dark spot is highlighted. Clinical and clean aesthetic.
In the consultation room. Mr. Kim, now in a patient gown, is sitting in front of a doctor (out of focus). His face is completely numb and shocked.
Wide shot of the hospital room. Mr. Kim is sitting alone on his bed, staring out of the large window at a gray, overcast city skyline. Deep solitude.
Close-up of a thin, wrinkled hand touching the cold glass of the window. Frost or condensation on the edges. Looking out at the world he is leaving.
A sterile metal meal tray with cold, untouched food sitting on a hospital table. The room is growing dark as evening approaches.
The hospital room door is opening slowly into the dark room, a beam of bright hallway light cutting across the floor. A silhouette appears.
Full-shot of the woman standing in the doorway. She looks beautiful but heartbroken, her shoulders shaking with silent sobs. Backlit by the hallway light.
Close-up of Mr. Kim turning his head toward the door. His expression is one of confusion and unrecognized familiarity. Deep shadows.
The woman rushes to the side of the hospital bed, falling to her knees and grabbing the sheets. She is crying out in grief.
Extreme close-up of Mr. Kim's face as the realization hits him. His eyes widen, and tears begin to flow down his wrinkled cheeks. Emotional peak.
Tear-blurred shot of two hands reaching for each other. One old and withered, one young and soft. About to touch for the first time in 20 years.
Extreme close-up of their hands interlocked, gripping tightly. A sense of unbreakable connection and warmth.
Mr. Kim looking up with a look of new determination and life in his eyes. He is speaking with strength, no longer resigned to death.
The daughter is wiping her tears away, looking at her father with a hopeful smile. She is nodding in agreement.
A wide, sun-drenched shot of the hospital garden in full bloom. Flowers, green trees, and a peaceful morning atmosphere. High key lighting.
Mr. Kim sitting in a wheelchair, looking at a bright yellow flower with a warm, peaceful smile. He looks healthier and full of life.
Wide shot of the daughter pushing Mr. Kim's wheelchair along a path in the garden, moving away from the camera. The light is shining behind them.
